---
title: "Projects"
listing: 
  - id: "projects"
    contents: "projects"
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    type: default
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 5
    image-placeholder: 'assets/images/default_post.jpg'
    categories: true
    feed: true
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
---

All of my past and current projects can be viewed here in these documents.

::: {#projects}
:::
